name: Vegetarian Rice Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl; stir until well blended.
2. Transfer about 1 1/2 cups of the mix to three separate one-pint containers.
3. Label each container as Vegetarian Rice Mix.
4. Store the containers in a cool, dry place and use within 6 to 8 months.
Makes approximately 4 1/2 cups of mix.
Vegetarian Rice:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine 1 1/2 cups of the mix, 2 cups cold water, and 3 tbsp butter or margarine.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce the heat and cover the saucepan.
4. Cook for 15 to 25 minutes, until all liquid is absorbed.
Makes 4 to 6 servings.
